title: microcos gossweileri
intro: Microcos gossweileri, also known as the Yellow-flowered Microcos, is a species of flowering plant in the family Malvaceae. This plant is traditionally used in herbal medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antioxidant activities. The health benefits of Microcos gossweileri include its potential to aid in wound healing, reduce fever, and alleviate symptoms of respiratory infections. The plant can be prepared into herbal teas, infusions, and decoctions, making it a valuable resource in traditional medicine, particularly in West and Central Africa where it is native.
